retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the function performs wide teardown; any failure path is not retryable.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to exit/uninitialize the wireless core: stopping microcode, freeing many resources (leds, rng, pio, dma, chip, radio, analog), freeing allocated memory, and disabling device. The only refcount operation is a dev_kfree_skb_any (put) on the beacon skb, which is just one component of the cleanup. The function is a comprehensive teardown routine, not a focused reference-count wrapper.
judge.retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the function performs wide teardown; any failure path is not retryable.

final.retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the function performs wide teardown; any failure path is not retryable.
